description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a blended wing body design, featuring smooth curves and a predominantly silver and orange color scheme. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the main body, with no visible separation between the fuselage and wings, giving it a highly aerodynamic appearance. The tail section includes twin vertical stabilizers angled outward, and the rear of the aircraft houses three large jet engines. The surface is adorned with bold orange patterns and circular insignias, adding to its modern aesthetic. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with a dark, elongated canopy suggesting an enclosed, multi-seat configuration. The landing gear is visible beneath the nose and main body, indicating a tricycle arrangement.
description: A futuristic, silver and orange blended wing body airplane with swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and three rear jet engines. Features a forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, swept wings, twin outward-angled vertical stabilizers, and three rear jet engines.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the blended wing body, bold orange patterns, and the integrated, swept-back wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the same aerodynamic profile and engine placement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the three large jet engines, twin vertical stabilizers, and the wide, swept wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, blended wing body with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are integrated into the fuselage with a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Triple rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin outward-angled vertical stabilizers with no horizontal stabilizer, forming a distinctive H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with an elongated canopy, likely multi-seat, positioned at the nose of the fuselage.
